pubmed_links: [Forsyth et al. (2020) Synaptic and Gene Regulatory Mechanisms in Schizophrenia, Autism, and 22q11.2 CNV-Mediated Risk for Neuropsychiatric Disorders](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31500805/)
summary: KLHL22 is encoded within the 22q11.2 chromosomal region and its protein-protein interaction network is enriched for overlap with genes downregulated in autism spectrum disorder; the broader 22q11.2 deletion is one of the highest-penetrance genetic risk factors for schizophrenia and confers elevated risk for autism spectrum disorder and intellectual disability. (emerging evidence)
